nasb.text: The Lord of hosts has sworn saying, “Surely, just as I have intended so it has happened, and just as I have planned so it will stand,

esv.text: The Lord of hosts has sworn: “As I have planned, so shall it be, and as I have purposed, so shall it stand,

cnv.text: 萬軍之耶和華起了誓，說： “我怎樣想，事就怎樣成就； 我怎樣計劃，事就怎樣立定，

ccb.text: 万军之耶和华起誓说： “我的计划必实现， 我的旨意必成就。

csbs.text: 万军之耶和华起誓说： “我怎样想，也必怎样成； 我怎样策划，也必怎样成立。
